events.label: assistant
events.text: I’ll verify the regulatory anchor for respirator cartridge labeling, then write the required JSON directly to `/app/answer.json`.

events.label: assistant
events.text: The key compliance point is OSHA 29 CFR 1910.134: cartridges in use must be NIOSH-labeled/color coded, and the selected respirator/cartridge has to match the respiratory hazard. A wrong cartridge color/ID is enough to fail at rough-complete because it can put the worker outside the approved protection path.

events.label: assistant
events.text: I’ve written the file. I’ll do a quick JSON parse check so the required artifact is valid.

events.label: assistant
events.text: `jq` is not installed in this container, so I’m using the available runtime parser instead of relying on a formatter.
